productName: Doozies PLUS - Green Apple 2:1 10pk (80g)(10mg THC;5mg CBG)
description: A gourmet-style crisp, sweet apple treat with imaginative flavor, balanced sweetness, and a clean infused finish. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity in a 2:1 ratio. Enjoy slowly and let the infused finish settle in at its own pace.
